Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for accounts to log in to the Dr.Web management server

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.account.name} to log in to the Dr.Web management server on host {src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.account.name} to log in to the Dr.Web management server on host {src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
